nasb.text: People will live in it, and there will no longer be a curse, for Jerusalem will dwell in security.

esv.text: And it shall be inhabited, for there shall never again be a decree of utter destruction.  Jerusalem shall dwell in security.

cnv.text: 城中必有人居住，必不再有毀滅的咒詛，耶路撒冷的人必安然居住。

ccb.text: 城内必有人居住，不再遭毁灭的咒诅。耶路撒冷必安享太平。
